revision.comment: Created page with " {{Navbox | name = Mizuhanome Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Mizuhanome Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Mizuhanome]] |group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Niukawakami Shrine]] * [[Atago Shrine (Tokyo)]] }}<noinclude> [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] </noinclude>"
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Mizuhanome Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Mizuhanome Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * [[Mizuhanome]]
|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Niukawakami Shrine]] * [[Atago Shrine (Tokyo)]]
}}<noinclude>
[[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
</noinclude>

|group2 = Shrines |list2 = * [[Niukawakami Shrine]] * [[Atago Shrine (Tokyo)]]
}}<noinclude>

</noinclude>

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Shizuri Faith]] to [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:{{subst:PAGENAME}}[[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Shizuri Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Shizuri Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{nihongo|{{ill|Takehazuchi|ja|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr}}|建葉槌命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|下照比売|lt=Shitateruhime-no-Mikoto|simple|Shitateruhime|fr}}|下照姫命|}} * {{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Takeminakata|8=en}}|建御名方命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ame-no-wakahiko|8=en}}|天稚彦命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Kotoshironushi|8=en}}|事代主命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Sukunabikona|8=en}}|少彦名命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|8=en}}|味耜高彦根命|}} |group2 = Origin Shrine |list2 = * {{ill|Katsuragi Shitori niimasu Amenohaikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社}}
|group3 = Engishiki Shrines |list3 = *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shizu Shrine|ja|静神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Kuwado Shrine|ja|鍬戸神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)}}'''
|group4 = Other shrines |list4= *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)}}'''
|group5= Minor Shrines |list5= * '''{{ill|Ōmika Shrine|8=ja|9=大甕神社|ja|大甕神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社}}'''
|group6= Other |list6= * [[Your Name]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:Shizuri Faith]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
</noinclude>

{{Navbox | name = Shizuri Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Shizuri Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Takehazuchi|ja|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi}}/{{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|下照比売|lt=Shitateruhime-no-Mikoto|simple|Shitateruhime|fr|lt=Shitateruhime}} * {{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Takeminakata|8=en}}|建御名方命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ame-no-wakahiko|8=en}}|天稚彦命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Kotoshironushi|8=en}}|事代主命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Sukunabikona|8=en}}|少彦名命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|8=en}}|味耜高彦根命|}} |group2 = Origin Shrine |list2 = * {{ill|Katsuragi Shitori niimasu Amenohaikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社}}
|group3 = Engishiki Shrines |list3 = *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shizu Shrine|ja|静神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Kuwado Shrine|ja|鍬戸神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)}}'''
|group4 = Other shrines |list4= *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)}}'''
|group5= Minor Shrines |list5= * '''{{ill|Ōmika Shrine|8=ja|9=大甕神社|ja|大甕神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社}}'''
|group6= Other |list6= * [[Your Name]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:Shizuri Faith]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)" to "|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)"
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Shizuri Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Shizuri Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Takehazuchi|ja|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi}}/{{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|下照比売|lt=Shitateruhime-no-Mikoto|simple|Shitateruhime|fr|lt=Shitateruhime}} * {{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Takeminakata|8=en}}|建御名方命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ame-no-wakahiko|8=en}}|天稚彦命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Kotoshironushi|8=en}}|事代主命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Sukunabikona|8=en}}|少彦名命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|8=en}}|味耜高彦根命|}} |group2 = Origin Shrine |list2 = * {{ill|Katsuragi Shitori niimasu Amenohaikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社}}
|group3 = Engishiki Shrines |list3 = *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shizu Shrine|ja|静神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Kuwado Shrine|ja|鍬戸神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)}}'''
|group4 = Other shrines |list4= *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)}}'''
|group5= Minor Shrines |list5= * '''{{ill|Ōmika Shrine|8=ja|9=大甕神社|ja|大甕神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社}}'''
|group6= Other |list6= * [[Your Name]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:Shizuri Faith]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Shizuri Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Shizuri Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Takehazuchi|ja|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi}}/{{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|下照比売|lt=Shitateruhime-no-Mikoto|simple|Shitateruhime|fr|lt=Shitateruhime}} * {{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Takeminakata|8=en}}|建御名方命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ame-no-wakahiko|8=en}}|天稚彦命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Kotoshironushi|8=en}}|事代主命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Sukunabikona|8=en}}|少彦名命|}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|8=en}}|味耜高彦根命|}} |group2 = Origin Shrine |list2 = * {{ill|Katsuragi Shitori niimasu Amenohaikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社}}
|group3 = Engishiki Shrines |list3 = *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shizu Shrine|ja|静神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Kuwado Shrine|ja|鍬戸神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)}}'''
|group4 = Other shrines |list4= *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)}}'''
|group5= Minor Shrines |list5= * '''{{ill|Ōmika Shrine|8=ja|9=大甕神社|ja|大甕神社}}''' * '''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社}}'''
|group6= Other |list6= * [[Your Name]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:Shizuri Faith]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shizuri Faith]][[Category:qq]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
revision.text:
{{Navbox | name = Shizuri Faith | title = [[Mizuhanome|Shizuri Faith]] | listclass = hlist |group1 = Main Deities |list1 = * {{ill|Takehazuchi|ja|天羽槌雄神|lt=Takehazuchi-no-Mikoto|simple|Takehazuchi|fr|Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|12=draft}}/{{ill|Shitateruhime|ja|下照比売|lt=Shitateruhime-no-Mikoto|simple|Shitateruhime|fr|lt=Shitateruhime|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|ja|天棚機姫神|12=draft}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Takeminakata|8=en}}|建御名方命||12=draft}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ame-no-wakahiko|8=en}}|天稚彦命||12=draft}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Kotoshironushi|8=en}}|事代主命||12=draft}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Sukunabikona|8=en}}|少彦名命||12=draft}} * {{nihongo|{{ill|Ajisukitakahikone|8=en}}|味耜高彦根命||12=draft}} |group2 = Origin Shrine |list2 = * {{ill|Katsuragi Shitori niimasu Amenohaikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine|ja|葛木倭文座天羽雷命神社|12=draft}}
|group3 = Engishiki Shrines |list3 = *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Isesaki)|ja|倭文神社 (伊勢崎市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shizu Shrine|ja|静神社|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nirasaki)|ja|倭文神社 (韮崎市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Fujinomiya)|ja|倭文神社 (富士宮市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Kuwado Shrine|ja|鍬戸神社|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Kasado Shrine|ja|加佐登神社|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Maizuru)|ja|倭文神社 (舞鶴市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Yosano)|ja|倭文神社 (与謝野町)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Asago)|ja|倭文神社 (朝来市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (鳥取市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|ja|倭文神社 (湯梨浜町)|1=Shitori Shrine (Tottori)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Kurayoshi)|ja|倭文神社 (倉吉市)|12=draft}}'''
|group4 = Other shrines |list4= *'''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tono)|ja|倭文神社 (遠野市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Nara)|ja|倭文神社 (奈良市)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Tsuyama)|ja|倭文神社 (津山市油木北)|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Shidori Shrine (Awaji)|ja|倭文神社 (あわじ市倭文委文)|12=draft}}'''
|group5= Minor Shrines |list5= * '''{{ill|Ōmika Shrine|8=ja|9=大甕神社|ja|大甕神社|12=draft}}''' * '''{{ill|Ishii Shrine|ja|石井神社|12=draft}}'''
|group6= Other |list6= * [[Your Name]]
}}<noinclude> [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:Shizuri Faith]] [[Category:Shinto templates]] [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:Mizuhanome Faith]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Shizuri Faith]][[Category:qq]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Undo revision [[Special:Diff/2391894|2391894]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])
Text replacement - "|Ame-no-wakahiko|" to "|Ame-no-wakahiko|1=Ame no Wakahiko|2=zh|3=天稚彥|4=ja|5=アメノワカヒコ|6=az|7=Ame-no-Vakahiko|"
Text replacement - "|天羽槌雄神|" to "|天羽槌雄神|1=Takehazuchi|2=ja|3=天羽槌雄神|4=zh|5=天羽槌雄神|6=fr|7=Takehazuchi|lt=Takehazuchi|"

Text replacement - "|天棚機姫神|" to "|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|"

Text replacement - "|天棚機姫神|" to "|天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|"

Text replacement - "|3=天棚機姫神|" to "|3=天棚機姫神|lt=Ame-no-Tanabatahime|1=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|2=ja|3=天棚機姫神|4=de|5=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|6=fr|7=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|8=zh|9=天棚機姫神|10=nl|11=Tanabatabime-no-Mikoto|"
Text replacement - "Shidori clan" to "Shizuri clan"
Text replacement - "|12=draft" to "|qq=draft"
Text replacement - "[[Category:qq]]" to ""
Text replacement - "Engishiki Shrines" to "Shikinaisha"
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Shinto cult templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: fix redirect [[Kotoshironushi]] → [[Kotoshironushi-no-Mikoto]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Text replacement - "</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Text replacement - "|qq=|" to "|"
Text replacement - "|qq=draft|" to "|"
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "|lt=Kotoshironushi" to "|WD=Q8009611|lt=Kotoshironushi"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Text replacement - "Katsuragi Shitori niimasu Amenohaikazuchi no Mikoto Shrine" to "Katsuraki Shitori-ni-imasu Ame-no-Haikazuchi-no-Mikoto Shrine"
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23582763848|commit triggered pipeline]]
Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵<noinclude>" to ""
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24296132115|time triggered pipeline]]
